source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.why_hot: World Cup match attracts global attention; Argentina is a top team.
topics.share_angle: Preview key players and tactics for the match.

topics.share_angle: Compare with pre-pandemic travel numbers and economic impact.

topics.chinese_topic: 《一九四二》豆瓣评分从6.1上涨至8.3

topics.why_hot: China's financial market opening; foreign issuers raise yuan funds.
